features: Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Activity Log page using the generated command-center blueprint
Added KPI row for total activities, today, this week, critical events, users active, and success rate
Combined activity records from patrol activity, patrol requests, proof items, reports, notifications, messages, signups, and properties
Added tabs: All Activities, User Actions, System Events, Security Events, Data Changes
Added filters: user, action, module, severity, date range
Added searchable audit trail table with time, user, action, module, details, IP address, severity, and actions
Added selected activity details rail with user, email, time, IP address, user agent, session ID, location, severity, and status
Added quick filters for My Activities, Failed Activities, Critical Events, Data Changes, and Login Activities
Added pagination, rows per page, clear filters, and working CSV export
Preserved Clients Command Center and sidebar fixes
